name: PVE Laptop Battery Shutdown
description: Installs a host-side battery monitor for Proxmox VE running on laptop hardware. The generated systemd timer checks battery state from /sys/class/power_supply and performs a graceful host shutdown when battery power remains below the configured threshold while AC power is offline.

notes.text: Set `DRY_RUN=1` in `/etc/default/pve-battery-monitor` before validating behavior on a production host.
